name: ChatCompletionRequest
description: Request body for creating a chat completion.

model.description: Provider and model name in the format provider/model-name (e.g., openai/gpt-4o, anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022).

messages.description: Array of messages comprising the conversation.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate.

stream.description: Whether to stream the response as SSE.
